ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test (e.g., Output High Voltage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line this test belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category this test belongs to */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard this test complies with */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES test_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test this parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Output High Voltage (V)) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum acceptable value for the parameter */,
  "typ" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., V, IO) */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum acceptable value for the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_parameters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_parameters_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test this condition applies to */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the test condition (e.g., I = 10µA) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the condition */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test condition */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value obtained from the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Pass/Fail status of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the test */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES test_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the audit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the audit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the audit */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_audits_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_audits_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_audits_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_audits_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard (e.g., ISO 9001) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standard was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the standard */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_standards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_standards_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Voltage Tests) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_categories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device (e.g., Multimeter) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., Digital, Analog) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration for the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the device entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the device entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_devices_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_devices_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result related to the entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., Test initiated, Result recorded) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the product line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product line was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the product line */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
